subject: New Request: Backend Engineer – Kotlin
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a mid Backend Engineer with strong experience in Kotlin. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Kotlin
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• MongoDB

Details:
Client: NordCast
Start: 2021-06-09
Duration: 6 months
Location: Malmö (on-site)
Rate: up to 750 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
